intro_subtitle: The procedural typography toolchain where every glyph breathes.
intro_genesis_desc: This is where it begins. Get inspired and design foundational glyphs, symbols, and characters, then collect them into your personal character bank.
intro_codex_desc: Take your character bank and turn it into fonts of many styles. You can download raw font files directly, or pass your library down the workflow to the Scribe.
intro_scribe_desc: The Scribe uses your characters, but not just as a static font. It adds the organic imperfections of true handwriting, ensuring that no two characters ever look the same—even when the same character is repeated.
intro_stamper_desc: Take the organic text produced by the Scribe and stamp it onto your 3D assets, either as a floating decal or baked directly into the model's texture.
intro_sculptor_desc: Extrude your 2D designs into the third dimension. Export your characters as 3D STLs for 3D printing or for further sculpting in other software.
intro_carver_desc: An experimental expert at digital engraving. The Carver uses height maps, normal maps, ambient occlusion, and advanced 3D tricks to carve your characters deep into your 3D models.
thedeep_desc: Fonts are only the beginning. Creating glyphs that fit neatly in a line is just the surface level of script design. My true passion is crafting writing systems that are so unique they completely defy becoming a font altogether.
